article_meta.title: Cartoon Carousel The nation’s cartoonists on the week in politics Every week political cartoonists throughout the countr

reasoning: Direction and magnitude are appropriate (Left, clear lean) with well-calibrated confidence, but the key_indicators include quoted/attributed language twice, violating the attribution rule.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Author’s prose strongly and consistently criticizes McCarthyism and contemporary conservative figures (e.g., ‘reckless campaign,’ ‘militant conservatism,’ ‘authoritarian style’). Left is correct.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: Bias signals are clear and repeated; 0.85 suits a clear lean in an opinion piece.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Most indicators cite author prose, but two include quoted/attributed phrases (Loomer’s quote; ‘a fraud and a hoax’), which violates attribution rules.
